.github/dependabot.yml.general_idea: Add a Dependabot configuration entry to automatically update GitHub Actions versions.

pom.xml.general_idea: Upgrade Spring Boot parent version to 4.0.1 to align with Java 21 requirements.
pom.xml.why_exists: Spring Boot 3.x does not fully support Java 21 as the baseline; Spring Boot 4.x is required for native Java 21 compatibility and access to new features.

pom.xml.general_idea: Update Java version property to 21 to target the new JDK.
pom.xml.why_exists: The project must compile and run on Java 21; keeping 17 would result in incorrect bytecode or missing language features.

pom.xml.general_idea: Replace spring-boot-starter-web with spring-boot-starter-webmvc to adapt to Spring Boot 4 dependency structure.
pom.xml.why_exists: Spring Boot 4 restructures web starters; using the old starter may cause missing classes or conflicts with the new MVC implementation.

pom.xml.general_idea: Replace spring-boot-starter-test with spring-boot-starter-webmvc-test to adapt to Spring Boot 4 testing dependencies.
pom.xml.why_exists: Spring Boot 4 changes test starter artifacts; the old starter may not include necessary test utilities for the new webmvc stack.

pom.xml.general_idea: Add thymeleaf-layout-dialect dependency to support layout features in Thymeleaf templates.
Add htmx-spring-boot-thymeleaf dependency to integrate HTMX with Spring Boot and Thymeleaf.
Add webjars-locator-lite to resolve WebJar resources correctly.
Add Bootstrap WebJar dependency for frontend styling.
Add Font Awesome WebJar dependency for icons.
Add Popper.js WebJar dependency for Bootstrap tooltips/popovers.
Add htmx.org WebJar dependency for HTMX functionality.
Add spring-boot-configuration-processor to generate metadata for configuration properties.
Add spring-boot-docker-compose to support Docker Compose integration for local development.
Add H2 database dependency for in-memory testing.
Remove testcontainers BOM management as it is no longer needed or handled differently.
Replace spring-boot-maven-plugin with maven-jar-plugin to customize JAR contents.
Add jreleaser-maven-plugin for automated release management.
Add maven-javadoc-plugin in release profile to attach Javadoc JARs.
Add maven-source-plugin in release profile to attach Source JARs.
Add project metadata (URL, licenses, developers, SCM) to pom.xml.
Update project version to 0.4.1-SNAPSHOT.
